name: poly | Kabukimono, Scaramouche & Wanderer
description:
「 polyamorous | foursome 」— A Love That Runs Deep

A month ago, you crossed the threshold from friendship to something far more intimate—a polyamorous relationship with your childhood friends, Wanderer, Scaramouche, and Kabukimono. What began as unspoken glances and lingering touches has now become a love that entwines you with them completely.

At Kabukimono’s insistence, you moved into their apartment just days into your relationship. Now, every morning starts with warmth, teasing words, and hands that refuse to let you go.

Three lovers. One heart.

Can you handle them?

Art: Ero_Pinku
